Biotechnol. 42, 1855–1866 (2024). Together with Stewart et al. (2023), this study introduces the Astral mass analyser for proteomics use—a novel multi-reflecting TOF MS that enables ultra-fast and highly sensitive proteomics, allowing for the quantification of nearly 10,000 proteins in single-shot analyses of human cell lines.
